headline: Senior Partners. Direct Access.
mission: We deliver high-speed retail and interior projects with zero junior hand-offs. You talk to the decision-makers from day one.
bio_1: TNC.18 is a Bangkok-based boutique design and construction firm with 18 years of precision craft. We specialise in retail environments, commercial interiors, and residential projects that demand both speed and permanence.
bio_2: Every project is handled directly by senior partners — no account managers, no junior relay. This means faster decisions, tighter lead times, and a single point of accountability from brief to handover.
